reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw USD. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — IS line item labeled Revenue. Direct map.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — IS line item labeled Cost of revenue. Direct map.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — IS line item labeled Gross profit. Direct map.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — IS line item labeled Operating income. Direct map.
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — IS line item labeled Income before income tax. Direct map.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — IS line item labeled Income tax expense. Direct map.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — IS line item labeled Net income, confirmed matches CF starting line (18775M for Q1 FY2026). No NCI — NVDA reports consolidated net income identical to parent.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating — IS line item labeled Interest expense. Filing discloses gross interest expense (63M) and interest income (515M) as separate IS lines; gross interest expense used per metric rules. Reported as negative per convention.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — CF addback labeled Stock-based compensation expense. Confirmed via xbrl_not_on_statement us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense = 1474M (same value). Direct map.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — CF addback labeled Depreciation and amortization (single combined line = 611M). Direct map.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — IS line item labeled Diluted weighted average shares. Reported in millions; converted to raw count.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — BS line item labeled Cash and cash equivalents. Direct map.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — BS line item labeled Marketable securities. Direct map.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — BS line item labeled Accounts receivable, net. Pure trade AR per calculation_components note.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — BS line item labeled Inventories. Direct map.
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — BS line item labeled Accounts payable. Pure trade AP per calculation_components note; no combined presentation.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — BS line item labeled Total assets. Direct map.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — BS line item labeled Total shareholders equity. No NCI present; this is parent-only equity.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: No current portion of long-term debt on BS. Commercial paper program has zero outstanding balance per Note 10. Confirmed zero per calculation_components.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — BS line item labeled Long-term debt. Direct map. Note 10 confirms carrying value equals face amount shown.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent (300M) from xbrl_not_on_statement — hidden inside Accrued and other current liabilities; Non-current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent (1521M) from BS line item labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities. Total = 1821M, confirmed by us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability = 1821M in xbrl_not_on_statement.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — CF line item labeled Net cash provided by operating activities. Direct map.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — CF investing line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets (1227M). Reported as negative per convention. Note: includes intangibles per label; supplemental non-cash capex of 408M excluded (not a cash payment).
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — CF investing line labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired (383M). Reported as negative per convention.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — IS line item labeled Research and development. Direct map.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — IS line item labeled Interest income. Used for Metric 21 (Unlevered FCF) and coverage context.
company_mapping.operating_lease_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent — from xbrl_not_on_statement; hidden inside Accrued and other current liabilities; value 300M.
company_mapping.operating_lease_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — BS line item labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities; value 1521M.
company_mapping.sbc_by_function_cost_of_revenue: Note 2 disclosure: SBC in cost of revenue = 64M. Source: calculation_components.sbc.note_by_function.
company_mapping.sbc_by_function_rd: Note 2 disclosure: SBC in R&D = 1063M. Source: calculation_components.sbc.note_by_function.
company_mapping.sbc_by_function_sga: Note 2 disclosure: SBC in SG&A = 347M. Source: calculation_components.sbc.note_by_function.
company_mapping.inventory_raw_materials: Note 8 disclosure: Raw materials = 2525M. Source: calculation_components.inventory.
company_mapping.inventory_wip: Note 8 disclosure: Work in process = 5339M. Source: calculation_components.inventory.
company_mapping.inventory_finished_goods: Note 8 disclosure: Finished goods = 3469M. Source: calculation_components.inventory.
company_mapping.intangible_amortization: us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets — xbrl_not_on_statement from IS section; Note 7 disclosure = 159M. Embedded within cost of revenue and operating expenses on IS face.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments used for lease cash; no explicit supplemental cash paid for interest line found in CF xbrl_not_on_statement. For Metric 21, approximate with IS interest expense of 63M.
company_mapping.operating_lease_payments: us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments — CF xbrl_not_on_statement supplemental disclosure = 96M for Q1 FY2026.
company_mapping.sg_and_a: us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense — IS line item labeled Sales, general and administrative. Direct map.
company_mapping.total_operating_expenses_below_gross: us-gaap:OperatingExpenses — IS line item labeled Total operating expenses (R&D + SGA only, not including COGS). Direct map.
company_mapping.other_income_expense_net: us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense — IS line item labeled Other income (expense), net. Direct map.
company_mapping.total_other_income_expense_net: us-gaap:NonoperatingIncomeExpense — IS line item labeled Total other income (expense), net. Direct map.
company_mapping.effective_tax_rate: us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations — xbrl_not_on_statement from IS section = 14.3% for Q1 FY2026.
company_mapping.deferred_revenue_current: us-gaap:ContractWithCustomerLiabilityCurrent — BS xbrl_not_on_statement; component of Accrued and other current liabilities = 1074M.
company_mapping.deferred_revenue_noncurrent: us-gaap:ContractWithCustomerLiabilityNoncurrent — BS xbrl_not_on_statement; component of Other long-term liabilities = 1004M.
company_mapping.goodwill: us-gaap:Goodwill — BS line item. Direct map.
company_mapping.capex_supplemental_noncash: us-gaap:CapitalExpendituresIncurredButNotYetPaid — CF xbrl_not_on_statement = 408M. Non-cash; excluded from cash capex but noted for completeness.
